working_on: Phase 5 Epistemology specialized seed (P5-01b) — second routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; b-half of the epistemology pre-split per phase_5.md T1-B. Apply via Supabase MCP; verify with validate.py. Closing P5-01b unblocks the P5-11 cross-bridges step's epistemology dependency.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0016_seed_epistemology_part1.sql with the specialized epistemology concepts at the granularity principle (~26 nodes covering social/virtue/formal/reliabilism/knowledge-first/understanding/evidentialism/skepticism-varieties/norms-of-assertion/closure-denial) and within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges (cross-references from P5-01a anchors plus within-cluster edges in the new seed). Confidence_level composition target: INTERPRETED >= 70% (this seed targets 100% INTERPRETED like P5-01a), SYNTHETIC <= 20% per phase_5.md T2-B. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in v1 registry). Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per T2-G #1. End state: P5-01b complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-01b passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes).

Match is in commit-message prose 'P5-01b status flipped pending -> complete in auto_target.json' — describing the auto_target.json status-field transition this session executed. Not a side-discovery; the transition is the routine-mode completion bookkeeping itself.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was: author 0016_seed_epistemology_part1.sql with ~26 specialized epistemology nodes + within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges; append ROUTING.md per-session narrative; apply via Supabase MCP; verify with validate.py; pass both P5-01b criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes); confidence_level INTERPRETED >= 70%; PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited. Delivered exactly that — 26 nodes (100% INTERPRETED, mirroring P5-01a), 38 edges (21 cross-references + 17 within-cluster), graph_version 2->3, no PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md edit, no cross-domain edges, both criteria PASS, validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails. No descoping, no reordering, no mid-session deferrals.

outcome_summary: Phase 5 epistemology specialized seed (P5-01b) lands at S-0053. 26 nodes + 38 edges across seven clusters (social/virtue/formal-Bayesian/reliabilism/knowledge-first/skepticism-varieties/norms). graph_version 2->3. Cold-review pass matches contract end-to-end. Both criteria PASS. validate.py: 30 checks, 0 hard-fails, 54 soft-warns (50 missing_rigor_score expected per T2-C; 4 issue_collision carryover #1/#2/#12/#13). Procedural finding (in-band): bundling deliverable + status-flip in one commit drops staged scope-check into no-op mode (no real escape; substantive paths within scope_lock); next routine fire should split commits. Lesson captured in MemPalace operations room. Backlog 2 -> 2 (no new Issues; #1, #2 upstream + #12, #13 from S-0052 audit remain).
